scripts.infra:up: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.infra.yml up -d; else docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml up -d; fi'
scripts.infra:down: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.infra.yml down; else docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml down; fi'
scripts.infra:logs: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.infra.yml logs -f; else docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml logs -f; fi'
scripts.infra:ps: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.infra.yml ps; else docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml ps; fi'
scripts.docker:prod:migrate: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production run --rm api pnpm --dir server exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker:prod:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production run --rm api pnpm --dir server exec prisma db seed
